# F038 Oracle Safe-Scale Capacity

## Decision
`F038_ORACLE_SAFE_NONZERO_SCALE_CAPACITY_EXISTS`

## Purpose
F037 used a deployable train-only retrieval-margin gate but still had a held-out recall miss. F038 is diagnostic only: it uses held-out labels to ask whether any nonzero scale could have preserved all no-regression gates and zero broken retrieval rows.

## Mean Metrics
- oracle nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- oracle safe scale mean: `0.410000`
- oracle transition: `0.337678`
- floor transition: `0.333054`
- oracle delta cosine: `0.925871`
- floor delta cosine: `0.912222`
- oracle recall@1: `0.859259`
- floor recall@1: `0.859259`
- oracle floor gap transition: `0.004624` (min `0.001979`)
- oracle floor gap delta cosine: `0.013649` (min `0.006063`)
- oracle floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- max oracle broken rows: `0`

No model is promoted. This is an oracle diagnostic that uses held-out labels only to measure capacity.
